name: Cliff House Zucchini Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Drain the pineapple well and set aside.
3. In a large bowl, beat together eggs, sugar, vanilla extract, and oil until smooth.
4. Stir in shredded zucchini.
5. In a separate bowl, mix flour, baking powder, baking soda, salt, and chopped pecans.
6. Add this mixture to the zucchini mixture, stirring to combine.
7. Fold in the crushed pineapple.
8. Pour the batter into a greased and floured 9" x 5" loaf pan.
9. Bake for 55-60 minutes, or until a wooden pick inserted in the center comes out clean.
